title: Water Supply Schedule
content: Water supply will be available from 6:00 AM to 8:00 AM and 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM daily.

title: Annual Maintenance Fee
content: Annual maintenance fee of Rs. 12,000 is due by 31st July. Please pay at the office.

title: Security Update
content: All residents are requested to use the new RFID tags for gate entry from 1st August.

title: Yoga Session
content: Free yoga sessions every morning at 6:30 AM in the community park. All ages welcome.

title: Garbage Collection
content: Garbage collection timings changed to 7:00 AM. Please segregate wet and dry waste.
